component.name: Vixen
component.summary: Flutter browser shell backed by Rust BrowserCore

description.p: Vixen is an experimental cross-platform browser with a Rust BrowserCore, WebRender output, headless automation, and a Flutter GUI. The Linux package runs the Flutter shell over the bounded native BrowserCore bridge. This FlatPark package repackages the official GitHub Release archive unchanged.

screenshot.caption: Browsing Example Domain in the Flutter Linux shell

description.p: Ship the BrowserCore-backed Flutter shell with the pinned 3.46 beta, Linux Impeller, and an official archive for FlatPark packaging.
Repair release dependency-policy and pinned native archive gates so install-tested Flatpak bundles publish reliably.
Advance the shared BrowserCore and Flutter shell, add bounded accessibility actions and release measurements, and verify installable release Flatpak bundles.
Fix Flatpak GL symbol loading for GTK/WebRender rendering.
Patch release with GitHub CI, Flatpak bundles, and project documentation.
Initial GTK WebRender browser vertical with tab lifecycle.
